system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.bg_thuongmaigo_thekho2","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[BG_THUONGMAIGO_THEKHO2]
(
	@tungay date,
	@denngay date,
	@loaigo nvarchar(max),
	@sokhoi_dauky decimal(18, 5) OUT,
	@sokhoi_cuoiky decimal(18, 5) OUT
)
AS
BEGIN
-- TỒN ĐẦU KỲ
	SELECT @sokhoi_dauky = SUM(IIF(m3 > 0, m3, IIF(xuatban > 0, xuatban, sanxuat)))
	FROM bg_xuatnhapgo A
	WHERE A.ngaynhap < @tungay AND (A.ngayxuatkho IS NULL OR A.ngayxuatkho >= @tungay) 
		AND COALESCE(A.isDelete, 0) = 0 AND LEN(A.loaigo) > 0
		AND loaigo = CASE WHEN @loaigo IS NULL THEN loaigo ELSE @loaigo END

-- TỒN CUỐI KỲ
	SELECT @sokhoi_cuoiky = SUM(IIF(m3 > 0, m3, IIF(xuatban > 0, xuatban, sanxuat)))
	FROM bg_xuatnhapgo A
	WHERE A.ngaynhap <= @denngay AND (A.ngayxuatkho IS NULL OR A.ngayxuatkho > @denngay) 
		AND COALESCE(A.isDelete, 0) = 0 AND LEN(A.loaigo) > 0
		AND loaigo = CASE WHEN @loaigo IS NULL THEN loaigo ELSE @loaigo END

-- DANH SÁCH NHẬP XUẤT
	SELECT A.ngaynhap, A.mancc, C.tenncc, A.loaigo, E.tenkhoahoc, D.nhomnguyenlieu,
		A.chungtu_nhap, A.chungtu_xuat,
		B.fsc_name, A.chatluong, A.malo_nguyenlieu,
		A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai,
		SUM(A.sothanh) AS sothanh,
		SUM(A.sokhoi_nhap) AS sokhoi_nhap,
		SUM(A.sokhoi_xuat) AS sokhoi_xuat
	FROM (
		SELECT A.ngaynhap, A.mancc, A.loaigo, A.tenkhoahoc_id,
			A.nhomnguyenlieu_id,
			chungtu_nhap = A.tokhai, 
			chungtu_xuat = NULL,
			A.fsc_id, A.ghichu AS chatluong, A.malo_nguyenlieu,
			A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.sothanh,
			sokhoi_nhap = IIF(A.m3 = 0, IIF(A.sanxuat = 0, A.xuatban, A.sanxuat), A.m3),
			0 AS sokhoi_xuat
		FROM bg_xuatnhapgo A
		WHERE A.ngaynhap BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay AND A.ngaynhap IS NOT NULL
			AND A.loaigo = @loaigo AND A.isDelete = 0
		UNION ALL
		SELECT A.ngayxuatkho, A.mancc, A.loaigo, A.tenkhoahoc_id, 
			A.nhomnguyenlieu_id,
			chungtu_nhap = NULL,
			chungtu_xuat = D.sophieu,
			A.fsc_id, A.ghichu AS chatluong, A.malo_nguyenlieu, 
			B.dayy, B.rong, B.dai, B.sothanh, 
			sokhoi_nhap = NULL,
			B.sokhoi
		FROM bg_xuatnhapgo A
		INNER JOIN bg_donhang_chitiet B ON A.id = B.id_chitiet
		INNER JOIN bg_donhang C ON B.sophieu = C.sophieu
		LEFT JOIN tr_dexuat_phoi D ON C.id_dexuat = D.id
		WHERE A.ngayxuatkho BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
			AND A.ngayxuatkho IS NOT NULL AND A.loaigo = @loaigo
	) A LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc B ON A.fsc_id = B.fsc_id
		LEFT JOIN bg_nhacc C ON A.mancc = C.mancc
		LEFT JOIN tr_nhom_nguyenlieu2 D ON A.nhomnguyenlieu_id = D.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_tenkhoahoc E ON A.tenkhoahoc_id = E.id
	GROUP BY A.ngaynhap, A.mancc, C.tenncc, A.loaigo, E.tenkhoahoc, D.nhomnguyenlieu,
		A.chungtu_nhap, A.chungtu_xuat,
		B.fsc_name, A.chatluong, A.malo_nguyenlieu,
		A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.bg_donhang","dbo.bg_donhang_chitiet","dbo.bg_nhacc","dbo.bg_xuatnhapgo","dbo.tr_dexuat_phoi","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_tenkhoahoc","dbo.tr_nhom_nguyenlieu2","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
